why-invalid: the goodput prediction is a bare point value — its predictedQuantity
omits the required "uncertainty" object (capacity-recommendation.schema.json,
$defs.predictedQuantity requires value + unit + uncertainty, and uncertainty requires
lower + upper + method). Stated uncertainty is structurally mandatory: a capacity
recommendation whose central prediction carries no interval and no method is a guess
dressed as a number, and inferops must not apply it as an experiment.
